inputs.label: Average Volume per SKU
inputs.businessContext: Average annual production quantity per SKU.

inputs.label: Number of Unique Components
inputs.businessContext: Total distinct raw materials or parts used across all SKUs.

inputs.label: Average BOM Levels
inputs.businessContext: Average depth of the bill of materials (number of subassembly tiers).

inputs.label: Average Setup Time per Changeover
inputs.businessContext: Average time to change a production line from one SKU to another.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing overhead as percentage of direct labor and material.

inputs.label: Complexity Type
inputs.businessContext: Category of complexity: 'product' (high SKU count), 'process' (high setup time), 'mixed' (both).

inputs.label: Use Lean Metrics (SMED, OEE)
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies SMED-based setup reduction and OEE factors.

rules.message: All numeric inputs must be positive.
For product complexity, SKU-to-component ratio should be >0.2 to avoid unrealistic data.
For process complexity, setup time should be at least 10 minutes.

thresholds.alert: Hidden cost exceeds 15% of estimated base cost – investigate complexity reduction.
Setup cost per SKU is high (>$5,000) – consider SMED or product rationalization.
Inventory holding cost exceeds $100,000 – review component commonality.

formulas.label: Setup Cost per SKU
formulas.description: Annual setup cost per SKU based on changeover time and labor rate.

formulas.label: Inventory Holding Cost
formulas.description: Cost of holding component inventory due to complexity (WIP and safety stock).

formulas.label: Quality Loss Cost
formulas.description: Cost of defects and rework driven by complexity (Six Sigma defect rate assumption).

formulas.label: Overhead Complexity Penalty
formulas.description: Additional overhead due to increased planning, scheduling, and material handling.

formulas.label: Lean Adjustment Factor
formulas.description: If use_lean_metrics is true, applies SMED reduction (30% setup time) and OEE improvement (15% quality loss).

formulas.label: Hidden Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Total hidden cost per unit produced, adjusted for lean metrics.
formulas.expression: (setup_cost_per_sku * lean_adjustment_factor + inventory_holding_cost + quality_loss_cost * lean_adjustment_factor + overhead_complexity_penalty) / (num_sku * avg_volume_per_sku)

formulas.label: Total Hidden Cost
formulas.description: Primary result: total annual hidden cost due to product complexity.

primary.label: Total Hidden Cost
primary.description: Annual hidden cost driven by product and process complexity.

hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Increases setup frequency and inventory complexity.
hiddenLossDrivers.recommended_action: Rationalize product portfolio using ABC analysis.

hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Drives inventory holding cost and overhead.
hiddenLossDrivers.recommended_action: Implement component commonality and modular design.

hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Reduces OEE and increases changeover cost.
hiddenLossDrivers.recommended_action: Apply SMED techniques to reduce setup time by 50%.

hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Amplifies WIP inventory and quality risk.
hiddenLossDrivers.recommended_action: Flatten BOM through design for assembly (DFA).

suggestedActions.action: Deploy SMED for top 20% of changeovers
Adopt Lean Six Sigma to reduce defect rate by 50%
